title: DataRequest
description: Contract for the QA UAT pipeline to request missing test data from the orchestrator agent. Emitted when exit code is 2 (PENDING_DATA). Written to evidence/<run_id>/data_request.json.

run_id.description: run_id from the intent_spec that triggered this request.

stage.description: Pipeline stage that detected the missing data.

requests.description: List of data fields that need resolution before the pipeline can proceed.

field.description: The placeholder token name (without braces), e.g. CLIENTE_ID.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this field represents.
examples: ID de un cliente activo con deuda vigente en el sistema

hint_query.description: Suggested SELECT query the orchestrator can run against the DB to find a valid value. Uses only read-only SELECT and whitelisted tables. The orchestrator must validate before executing.
examples: SELECT TOP 1 RIDIOMA FROM RIDIOMA WHERE ESTADO = 'A' ORDER BY NEWID()

reason.description: Why this field is needed (context from the test case).
examples: Required by test case P01: buscar cliente por ID en FrmBusqueda

in_case_ids.description: Test case IDs that reference this field.

resume_command.description: The exact CLI command the orchestrator must run after writing resolved_data.json to continue the pipeline.

resolved_data_path.description: Where the orchestrator should write the resolved_data.json file.
